channel.title: programming language on Observer
channel.description: Recent content in programming language on Observer

item.title: Programming Language - Subtyping
item.description: Some Good Subtyping Rules Width subtyping: A supertype can have a subset of fields with the same types, i.e., a subtype can have extra fields. Permutation subtypings: A supertype can have the same set of fields with the same types in a different order.
